items.inspection_target: Every ghost vertex has at least three special points; nonconstant components carry positive energy.
items.validation: component-stability-ledger.json checks constant components and tree edges.

items.concept: Gromov convergence with rescalings and node matching
items.inspection_target: A shrinking disc on the parent becomes the bubble sphere; the annulus records neck collapse.
items.validation: rescaling-convergence.json checks lambda_n -> 0, node labels, and energy balance.

items.inspection_target: Directed paths show which theorem moves are needed before compact metrizability.
items.validation: compactness-topology-proof-graph.json checks acyclicity and required reachability.

items.concept: rho-neighborhoods and uniqueness of sequence limits
items.inspection_target: The same sequence cannot have two separated rho-limits.
items.validation: topology-neighborhood-check.json checks tail convergence and separation.
